sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try ACTION7
result = action(['ACTION7'])
print(f"Result: {result}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {result.get('done', False)}")

# Check agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
agent_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
for n in agent_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"Agent: rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Check pink object
pink_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'P']
for n in pink_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"Pink: rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the agent to see if it moves
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 38, 'col': 21}])
print(f"Result: {result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
agent_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
for n in agent_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"Agent after click: rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Check if anything changed
print(f"Board changed: {result.get('board_changed', False)}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
